text:
PHOENIX (AZFamily)— Highly decorated gymnasts are about to hit the road for theGold Over America Tour, and we will have a chance to see them right here in Phoenix!

Simone Biles will lead the Gold Over America Tour and perform alongside otherOlympic gymnastssuch as Jade Carey, Jordan Chiles, Hezly Rivera, Paul Juda, Fred Richard and more.

“This is an opportunity for us to do our little victory lap after the super successful gymnasts competitions at the Olympics,” Team USA Olympic gymnast Paul Juda said.

Stephen Nedoroscik, the pommel horse specialist who captured America’s hearts during the Olympics, was removed from the roster last week after it was announced he would compete on theupcoming season of “Dancing With The Stars.”

The tour begins on Sept. 16 in California but makes its second stop in Phoenix on Sept. 18. The event will be held at the Footprint Center, and tickets can be purchasedhere.

Ticket prices range from $30 to $560. VariousVIP packagesare also available, which include a chance to meet the team and take photos with them.

“We’re gonna have the best of the best athletes all in one place having fun and putting on a great performance for the crowd,” Juda said.

title: Olympic gymnasts head to Phoenix for Gold Over America Tour
description: Olympic gymnasts are hitting the road for the "Gold Over America Tour," with a stop right here in Phoenix!
keywords: azfamily,phoenix news,arizona news,gold over america tour,GOAT tour,simone biles,team usa gymnastics,gymnastics,usa gymnastics ,paul juda,jade carey
